zh.lifeSummary: 當Avice d'Aubigny於1176年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel38歲，母親Matilda de Saint-Hilaire44歲。她與William Mowbray結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1224年3月在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭恩布利亞巴羅 在 福內斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avice d'Aubigny于1176年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel38岁，母亲Matilda de Saint-Hilaire44岁。她与William Mowbray结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1224年3月在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰恩布利亞巴羅 在 福內斯。

nameMeanings.name: Avice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Avice d'Aubigny was born in 1176, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel, was 38 and her mother, Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, was 44. She married William Mowbray. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in March 1224, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Barrow in Furness, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avice d'Aubigny est née en 1176, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé William Mowbray. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en mars 1224, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Barrow in Furness, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Barrow-In-Furness, Cumbria, England: Barrow in Furness, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Avice d'Aubigny 1176 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel 38 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Saint-Hilaire 44. Sie hat William Mowbray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im März 1224 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Barrow in Furness, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato William Mowbray. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1224, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Barrow in Furness, Cumbria, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Avice d'Aubignyが1176年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundelは38歳，母Matilda de Saint-Hilaireは44歳であった。William Mowbrayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1224年3月にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンブリアバーロー イン ファーネスにて埋葬された。

ko.Barrow-In-Furness, Cumbria, England: 영국 잉글랜드 쿠브리아 배로 인 퍼네스
ko.lifeSummary: Avice d'Aubigny(이)가 1176년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Saint-Hilaire(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 William Mowbray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 3월 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 쿠브리아 배로 인 퍼네스에 묻혔다.

ru.Barrow-In-Furness, Cumbria, England: барроу ин фьурнесс, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avice d'Aubigny родилась в 1176 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Mowbray. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла марта 1224 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности барроу ин фьурнесс, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания.
